dim: WHO; trailing owid_region metadata col present

name: Total alcohol consumption per capita
unit: litres of pure alcohol per capita (15+)

name: Deaths from natural disasters (WHO GHE)
dim: WHO GHE; all ages, both sexes

dim: World Bank; World series present (4 yrs)

dim: World Bank; World series present (3 yrs)

name: Current health expenditure per capita (PPP)
dim: World Bank / WHO GHED; value column is the per-capita PPP series

name: Current health expenditure as share of GDP
COVID-19 global cumulative totals (Worldometers)
dim: snapshot only (no time dim); updated ts=2026-06-16 but todayCases=0/todayDeaths=0 => cumulative counters FROZEN, not live deltas

name: COVID-19 USA per-state cumulative totals
unit: cumulative cases/deaths per US state + per-million

name: COVID-19 global historical time-series (JHU CSSE)
dim: DAILY but FROZEN: last date 3/9/23 (JHU ended). ?lastdays=N supported

name: COVID-19 USA historical time-series (JHU CSSE)
dim: DAILY; frozen, last date 3/9/23. /historical/{country} = 289 country/province series, same 3/9/23 cutoff

name: COVID-19 global vaccine doses administered (Owid)
dim: DAILY 12/1/20->7/21/25 (1694 days) but value FLAT/frozen (no distinct values last 60d). ?lastdays=all|N, ?fullData=true/false

name: COVID-19 vaccine doses by country (Owid)
unit: cumulative doses, daily timeline keyed M/D/YY
dim: per-country (e.g. USA) timeline ends 7/21/25 but frozen. Also /vaccine/coverage/countries (all)

name: Influenza-like illness outpatient surveillance (CDC FluView ILINet)
unit: weekly ILI counts by age band, totalILI, totalPatients, percentWeightedILI
dim: WEEKLY (epi-week 'YYYY - WW/52'); scraper updated 2026-06-16 BUT data FROZEN: 29 rows only, 2021-W40->2022-W16 (~Apr 2022). Staler than COVID

name: Influenza virus subtyping, US public health labs (CDC FluView)
unit: weekly positive tests by subtype A(H3N2v)/A(H1N1)/A(H3)/B/BVIC/BYAM, totalTests
dim: WEEKLY; FROZEN, last week 2022-W16. Only ILINet & USPHL exist under /influenza/cdc/ (USPHLPS, WHO_NREVSS_* = 404)

name: COVID-19 national government source time-series
dim: Index /v3/covid-19/gov = 9 countries (Canada,India,Italy,NewZealand,Nigeria,SouthAfrica,Switzerland,UK,Vietnam). gov/UK span 2020-03-31->2023-12-01 but last NON-zero real data 2022-05-20; trailing dates zero-padded. Frozen

name: Apple mobility country index
unit: list of country/region codes with mobility data
dim: Apple discontinued mobility 2022 => permanently frozen. /apple/countries/{c} returns subregion list. Mobility proxy, not a disease metric
